016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.functions;
018
019import java.util.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
022
023/**
024 * JSON-navigation functions for the {@code #{...}} script catalog.
025 *
026 * <p>
027 * All functions accept JSON strings as input and parse on each call via {@link MiniJson}. This
028 * is intentionally a per-resolve cost — for repeated lookups against the same JSON document the
029 * caller can pre-compile the surrounding template ({@link VarResolver#compile(String)}) so the
030 * tokenization is amortized; the JSON parse itself is not yet cached and is a known follow-on
031 * optimization opportunity.
032 */
033public final class JsonFunctions {
034
035   private JsonFunctions() {}
036
037   /** All function classes in this category. */
038   @SuppressWarnings({
039      "unchecked", // Cast is safe: type verified by caller context.
040      "java:S2386" // ALL is an immutable compile-time registry; exposed as an array for the cross-package/varargs functions(...) API, so visibility cannot be reduced.
041   })
042   public static final Class<? extends VarFunction>[] ALL = new Class[] {
043      JsonPath.class, Get.class, Keys.class, Values.class, Size.class
044   };
045
046   /**
047    * {@code #{jsonPath(json, path)}} / {@code #{jsonPath(json, path, default)}} — extracts a
048    * value via a slash-rooted path (e.g. {@code "/data/0/name"}).
049    *
050    * <p>
051    * Returns the matched value as a String (objects/arrays serialize back to JSON). Missing
052    * path returns {@code ""} for the two-arg form, or {@code default} for the three-arg form.
053    */
054   public static class JsonPath extends TypedFunction {
055      @Override public String name() { return "jsonPath"; }
056      public String invoke(String json, String path) { return invoke(json, path, ""); }
057      public String invoke(String json, String path, String defaultValue) {
058         var root = MiniJson.parse(json);
059         var v = navigate(root, path);
060         if (v == null) return defaultValue == null ? "" : defaultValue;
061         return MiniJson.render(v);
062      }
063
064      @SuppressWarnings({
065         "unchecked",  // Cast is safe: type verified by caller context.
066         "java:S3776"  // Cognitive complexity acceptable for JSON path navigation dispatch
067      })
068      private static Object navigate(Object root, String path) {
069         if (root == null || path == null) return null;
070         var p = path.startsWith("/") ? path.substring(1) : path;
071         if (p.isEmpty()) return root;
072         var current = root;
073         for (var seg : p.split("/")) {
074            if (current == null) return null;
075            if (current instanceof Map<?, ?> m) {
076               current = ((Map<String, Object>) m).get(seg);
077            } else if (current instanceof List<?> l) {
078               int idx;
079               try { idx = Integer.parseInt(seg); } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) { return null; }
080               if (idx < 0 || idx >= l.size()) return null;
081               current = l.get(idx);
082            } else {
083               return null;
084            }
085         }
086         return current;
087      }
088   }
089
090   /**
091    * {@code #{get(json, key)}} — extracts {@code json[key]} (object) or {@code json[index]}
092    * (array, when {@code key} parses as int).
093    */
094   @SuppressWarnings({
095      "unchecked" // Cast is safe: type verified by caller context.
096   })
097   public static class Get extends TypedFunction {
098      @Override public String name() { return "get"; }
099      public String invoke(String json, String key) {
100         var v = MiniJson.parse(json);
101         if (v == null || key == null) return "";
102         if (v instanceof Map<?, ?> m) {
103            var x = ((Map<String, Object>) m).get(key);
104            return x == null ? "" : MiniJson.render(x);
105         }
106         if (v instanceof List<?> l) {
107            int idx;
108            try { idx = Integer.parseInt(key); } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) { return ""; }
109            if (idx < 0 || idx >= l.size()) return "";
110            var x = l.get(idx);
111            return x == null ? "" : MiniJson.render(x);
112         }
113         return "";
114      }
115   }
116
117   /** {@code #{keys(json)}} — returns a JSON-array-shortcut string of an object's keys. */
118   @SuppressWarnings({
119      "unchecked" // Cast is safe: type verified by caller context.
120   })
121   public static class Keys extends TypedFunction {
122      @Override public String name() { return "keys"; }
123      public String invoke(String json) {
124         var v = MiniJson.parse(json);
125         if (!(v instanceof Map<?, ?> m)) return "[]";
126         return JsonShortcut.encodeArray(new ArrayList<>(((Map<String, Object>) m).keySet()));
127      }
128   }
129
130   /** {@code #{values(json)}} — returns a JSON-array-shortcut string of an object's values (or array elements). */
131   @SuppressWarnings({
132      "unchecked" // Cast is safe: type verified by caller context.
133   })
134   public static class Values extends TypedFunction {
135      @Override public String name() { return "values"; }
136      public String invoke(String json) {
137         var v = MiniJson.parse(json);
138         if (v instanceof Map<?, ?> m) {
139            var out = new ArrayList<String>();
140            for (var x : ((Map<String, Object>) m).values()) out.add(MiniJson.render(x));
141            return JsonShortcut.encodeArray(out);
142         }
143         if (v instanceof List<?> l) {
144            var out = new ArrayList<String>();
145            for (var x : l) out.add(MiniJson.render(x));
146            return JsonShortcut.encodeArray(out);
147         }
148         return "[]";
149      }
150   }
151
152   /**
153    * {@code #{size(json)}} — returns the count: object key count, array length, string
154    * length, or {@code 0} for null/primitives.
155    */
156   public static class Size extends TypedFunction {
157      @Override public String name() { return "size"; }
158      public String invoke(String json) {
159         var v = MiniJson.parse(json);
160         if (v == null) return "0";
161         if (v instanceof Map<?, ?> m) return String.valueOf(m.size());
162         if (v instanceof List<?> l) return String.valueOf(l.size());
163         if (v instanceof String s) return String.valueOf(s.length());
164         return "0";
165      }
166   }
167}
